scripts.sync: npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.run:android: npm run sync && cap run android
scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleSecureDebug
scripts.build:aab:release: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleSecureRelease
scripts.build:apk:lan-debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleLanDebug
